query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A white dog shown in profile facing right, its head and neck filling the center of the frame, with a dark eye and dark nose area visible amid light-colored fur, set against a background that shifts between areas of red, blue, green, and yellow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A profile view of a white dog's head and neck facing right against a multicolored background, rendered with extreme intentional blur and softened detail so that the fur and facial features dissolve into mushy, indistinct textures with almost no fine surface definition, the forms highly abstracted to prioritize color and gesture over representational clarity.
